title: Taser-maker Axon to take First Republic Bank's spot in the S&P 500
text: First Republic Bank's spot in the S&P 500 Index will be taken over by Axon Enterprise Inc., S&P Dow Jones Indices said Monday, following the bank's collapse and a planned takeover by JPMorgan Chase.
